org.apache.paimon.hive.migrate

Class HiveMigrator

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.hive.migrate.HiveMigrator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Migrator

    public class HiveMigrator
extends Object
implements Migrator
    Migrate hive table to paimon table.

      static class  HiveMigrator.MigrateTask
      One import task for one partition.
